title: Newtype USA June and July 2007 article scans
display_title: Newtype USA June and July 2007 article scans
wikitext:
[]: Newtype USA June & July 2007 article scans             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 20, 2012 9:45 pm Jeez, apparently I missed these two way back when. Instead of a transcript, have some scans for reference/archive's sake. Newtype USA June 2007 Volume 06, Number 06: [URL=http://s74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/Rebuild%20stuff/Newtype%20USA%20Eva/?action=view&current=NTJune07-02.jpg] [/URL] [URL=http://s74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/Rebuild%20stuff/Newtype%20USA%20Eva/?action=view&current=NTJune07-01e.jpg] [/URL] [URL=http://s74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/Rebuild%20stuff/Newtype%20USA%20Eva/?action=view&current=NTJune07-04.jpg] [/URL] [URL=http://s74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/Rebuild%20stuff/Newtype%20USA%20Eva/?action=view&current=NTJune07-03.jpg] [/URL] Poor Misato ended up funny-looking in the scanning process. Newtype USA July 2007 Volume 06, Number 07: [URL=http://s74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/Rebuild%20stuff/Newtype%20USA%20Eva/?action=view&current=NTJuly07-02.jpg] [/URL] [URL=http://s74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/Rebuild%20stuff/Newtype%20USA%20Eva/?action=view&current=NTJuly07-01.jpg] [/URL] Apparently I wrote a sidenote: "fanwankers and in general, yay!" >_>

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Jun 21, 2012 11:34 pm I came on here a few days ago hoping for some sort of discussion and I left disappointed when all the threads were dead. I come back today, only too see around nine new threads pop up out of nowhere with quite a lot of stuff. I need to schedule my visits to these forums more. OT: Those pictures look pretty cool.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Fri Jun 22, 2012 12:42 am SSD, it would be a good idea to auto-fix these up in Picmonkey . You can get more vibrance out of it. You can also sharpen them to make them easier to read (if I remember properly).

[]: Re: Newtype USA June & July 2007 article scans             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Fri Jun 29, 2012 2:22 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Newtype USA July 2007 Volume 06, Number 07: [URL=http://s74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/Rebuild%20stuff/Newtype%20USA%20Eva/?action=view&current=NTJuly07-02.jpg] [/URL] [URL=http://s74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/Rebuild%20stuff/Newtype%20USA%20Eva/?action=view&current=NTJuly07-01.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Jun 29, 2012 3:21 pm ^ Rei seems a bit too relaxed in that pose.

[]:             Quote Post by Drabant » Sat Jun 30, 2012 6:09 pm She does look a bit stiff. I guess the entryplug seats are even less comfortable than they look.
